failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 129 chars and 876px — "ERROR rate over time logs/app.log, bucketed into 10-minute windows ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 9 12 0 1 5 11 4 1"

artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="logs/app.log, bucketed into 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <Stack direction="vertical" gap="md">
    <Text variant="muted">Counts of ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket across the one-hour log window, from 09:00 to 09:50.</Text>
    <LogStream file="logs/app.log" match="ERROR" groupBy="10m" kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
    <Grid columns="3" gap="md">
      <Metric label="Total errors" value="22" detail="across the full hour" />
      <Metric label="Peak bucket" value="11" detail="09:30 bucket" tone="danger" />
      <Metric label="Buckets covered" value="6" detail="10-minute windows" />
    </Grid>
  </Stack>
</Card>
